what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links a specific board item to the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id att-cf1721e9, channel dragnet-development, attachment_type board_items, target board://item-389c8489, and an added ISO timestamp
No body content beyond the frontmatter
standouts: References a board item via a board:// URI
notes: A dated dragnet-development channel attachment pointing to board item item-389c8489.
questions: What content or state does board://item-389c8489 represent?
purpose_vs_actual: The frontmatter fields identify it as a board_items attachment targeting a board item, which matches its actual content; it carries no item payload.
intention_signals: To record that a particular board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel and to note when the attachment was added.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed association between a channel and a board item, supporting traceability and lookup of channel-related board content.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file of type board_items linking the dragnet-development channel to board item item-389c8489 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record and timestamp the association of a specific board item with the dragnet-development channel.
